name: W8 Push Morning Flow
description: 15 min. Same structure as W7. All bodyweight, no equipment needed. Shoulder health + overhead activation + stretch. NO BANDS.

exercises.notes: Lie on your side, elbow at 90, rotate forearm up. No band — gravity is the resistance. Slow and controlled.
Face down, arms in Y overhead. Lower traps + rotator cuff. Hold at top 1 second.
Arms locked, only shoulder blades move — retract then protract. Serratus anterior work.
Back flat against wall. Should be getting deeper by W8.
Standard, easy. Chest activation before the gym.
Open up chest and hip flexors.

tips: 15 min — same as W7. All bodyweight, no bands, no equipment.
Side-lying external rotation + prone Y raises = rotator cuff insurance.
Scapular push-ups: serratus anterior stabilizes all pressing. Keep these in.
If short on time: shoulder health block only. 5 min of the most important stuff.
